side_effects.description: GHK-Cu vial developed visible contamination (flakes) after reconstitution with vendor bacteriostatic water
Tesamorelin reconstituted with vendor bacteriostatic water turned into gel, indicating contamination or degradation

protocol_notes: Used vendor-supplied bacteriostatic water (3ml vial that was underweight) for reconstitution. Switched to Hospira bacteriostatic water for subsequent GHK-Cu vial which was clean. Concluded vendor's bacteriostatic water was contaminated/substandard. Discontinued relationship with vendor.
